industrials.oneliner: Industrials momentum is broadly positive, with surging new orders and freight activity offset by a capex stumble.

new_orders.summary: The ISM Manufacturing New Orders sub-index registered 56.8 in May 2026, up 2.7 percentage points from April's reading of 54.1, marking its fifth consecutive month of expansion.

manufacturing_pmi.summary: The ISM Manufacturing PMI rose to 54.0 in May 2026, up from 52.7 in each of the prior two months, beating forecasts of 53.0 (source: tradingeconomics.com, released June 2026).

capex_signals.summary: Non-defense capital goods ex-aircraft (core capex) fell -1.1% MoM in April 2026, reversing the prior month's +3.9% rise, signaling a near-term declining trend in business investment intentions.
